name: Learning Platform
description: Complete learning and community platform - manage courses, enrollments, sections, lessons, certificates, communities, spaces, posts, and memberships

tools.name: learning_list_courses
tools.description: List courses with filtering by category, instructor, status, and pagination

tools.name: learning_create_course
tools.description: Create a new course with title, description, pricing, and configuration

tools.name: learning_get_course
tools.description: Get course details by ID, optionally including sections and instructor info

tools.name: learning_get_course_by_slug
tools.description: Get course details by URL slug

tools.name: learning_update_course
tools.description: Update course details like name, description, status, pricing, etc.

tools.name: learning_delete_course
tools.description: Soft-delete a course

tools.name: learning_enroll_in_course
tools.description: Enroll current user in a course (shorthand for enrollment-create)

tools.name: learning_purchase_course
tools.description: Initialize a course purchase with payment processing

tools.name: learning_complete_purchase
tools.description: Complete a course purchase after payment confirmation

tools.name: learning_get_my_progress
tools.description: Get current user's enrollment and progress for a specific course

tools.name: learning_check_course_access
tools.description: Check if a user has access to a course

user_id.description: User ID to check access for

tools.name: learning_create_enrollment
tools.description: Enroll a specific user in a course (admin enrollment)

tools.name: learning_list_enrollments
tools.description: List enrollments with filtering by course, user, and status

tools.name: learning_get_enrollment
tools.description: Get enrollment details with progress information

tools.name: learning_update_progress
tools.description: Update progress for a specific lesson within an enrollment

time_spent_seconds.description: Time spent on lesson in seconds

tools.name: learning_complete_enrollment
tools.description: Mark an enrollment as completed and optionally issue a certificate

issue_certificate.description: Whether to issue a completion certificate

tools.name: learning_revoke_enrollment
tools.description: Revoke a user's enrollment/access to a course

tools.name: learning_list_sections
tools.description: List all sections for a course

tools.name: learning_create_section
tools.description: Create a new section within a course

tools.name: learning_update_section
tools.description: Update a course section

tools.name: learning_delete_section
tools.description: Delete a course section and its lessons

tools.name: learning_list_lessons
tools.description: List all lessons for a course

tools.name: learning_list_lessons_by_section
tools.description: List lessons within a specific section

tools.name: learning_create_lesson
tools.description: Create a new lesson within a section

section_id.description: Section ID to add lesson to

tools.name: learning_get_lesson
tools.description: Get lesson details with content and attachments

tools.name: learning_update_lesson
tools.description: Update lesson content, title, or settings

tools.name: learning_delete_lesson
tools.description: Delete a lesson

tools.name: learning_create_lesson_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a lesson

tools.name: learning_list_lesson_comments
tools.description: List comments on a lesson

tools.name: learning_list_certificates
tools.description: List certificates with filtering by user, course, and revocation status

tools.name: learning_get_certificate
tools.description: Get certificate details by ID, UUID, or verification code

tools.name: learning_verify_certificate
tools.description: Verify a certificate's authenticity by verification code (public endpoint)

tools.name: learning_revoke_certificate
tools.description: Revoke a certificate

tools.name: learning_create_certificate_template
tools.description: Create a certificate template with custom HTML/CSS design

tools.name: learning_list_certificate_templates
tools.description: List available certificate templates

tools.name: learning_list_communities
tools.description: List communities accessible to the user with filtering

tools.name: learning_discover_communities
tools.description: List public communities for discovery, sorted by popularity

tools.name: learning_create_community
tools.description: Create a new community with customization options

tools.name: learning_get_community
tools.description: Get community details by ID, optionally including spaces and courses

tools.name: learning_get_community_public
tools.description: Get public community landing page by slug

tools.name: learning_update_community
tools.description: Update community settings, branding, and configuration

tools.name: learning_delete_community
tools.description: Delete a community

tools.name: learning_join_community
tools.description: Join a community as a member

tools.name: learning_leave_community
tools.description: Leave a community

tools.name: learning_list_community_members
tools.description: List members of a community with filtering by role and status

tools.name: learning_update_community_member
tools.description: Update a community member's role, status, or settings

tools.name: learning_get_community_leaderboard
tools.description: Get the community leaderboard rankings

tools.name: learning_create_community_invite
tools.description: Create an invite code/link for a community

tools.name: learning_use_community_invite
tools.description: Redeem an invite code to join a community

tools.name: learning_list_spaces
tools.description: List community spaces with filtering

tools.name: learning_create_space
tools.description: Create a new community space

tools.name: learning_get_space
tools.description: Get space details by ID

tools.name: learning_update_space
tools.description: Update a community space

tools.name: learning_join_space
tools.description: Join a community space

tools.name: learning_leave_space
tools.description: Leave a community space

tools.name: learning_list_space_posts
tools.description: List posts within a specific space

tools.name: learning_create_space_post
tools.description: Create a new post in a space

tools.name: learning_list_posts
tools.description: List all posts with optional filtering by space

tools.name: learning_get_post
tools.description: Get post details by ID

tools.name: learning_update_post
tools.description: Update a post's content or title

tools.name: learning_delete_post
tools.description: Delete a post

tools.name: learning_like_post
tools.description: Toggle like on a post

tools.name: learning_bookmark_post
tools.description: Toggle bookmark on a post

tools.name: learning_list_post_comments
tools.description: List comments on a post

tools.name: learning_create_post_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a post, with optional threading via parent_id

tools.name: learning_update_comment
tools.description: Update a comment's content

tools.name: learning_delete_comment
tools.description: Delete a comment

tools.name: learning_list_members
tools.description: List community members with filtering by role and status

tools.name: learning_subscribe_membership
tools.description: Subscribe a user to a membership product
